name: Reese Peanut Butter Bars
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the melted margarine, peanut butter, and graham cracker crumbs in a bowl until combined.
2. Stir in the powdered sugar until evenly distributed.
3. Fold in the chocolate chips.
4. Press the mixture into a greased 9 by 13 inch pan.
5. Melt the chocolate chips and spread over the bars.
6. Allow to cool completely, then cut into bars.
7. Yield: 24 to 30 bars.
